description_long: This object is a rustic, cylindrical stool made from a solid section of tree trunk, with the bark partially intact around the sides. The top surface is flat and shows the natural wood grain, with some weathering and minor irregularities. The sides display a rough, textured bark with areas of missing bark revealing the underlying wood. The coloration is a mix of dark brown, gray, and lighter wood tones, giving it a natural, aged appearance. The base is uneven, with some bark protrusions and a slightly irregular circumference. This stool would blend seamlessly into outdoor urban parks, gardens, or rustic-themed public spaces.
description: A rustic, cylindrical wooden stool made from a solid tree trunk with natural bark and a flat, weathered top. The surface is rough and textured, showing natural wood grain and bark.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat top and a prominent patch of rough bark at the base, with visible wood grain and weathered texture.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the smoother side with less bark and more exposed wood, showing the cylindrical shape clearly.
description_view_2: View reveals a large, rough bark patch on the lower right and a slightly slanted top surface.
description_view_3: Back view displays mostly exposed wood with minimal bark, emphasizing the natural grain and weathered appearance.
